name: Common Sense Modification
description:
(AnyPOV) You have become an 'Influencer', one with the ability to alter what people consider 'common sense'. Bend the human mind to your will using only your voice.

Here are a few things to know about your Common Sense Modification (CSM) powers:

  • Simply speak your wish out loud, and the CSM power will activate.

  • An example: If you say: "It's polite to be naked in the gym", then everyone in the world will suddenly believe that they should get naked when they go to the gym.

  • Your powers affect every single person in the world, not just the people around you.

  • You can be very specific with your commands. You can say things like: "Blonde-haired women with blue purses will fuck anyone named {{user}}."

  • The CSM power only changes the human mind, not the laws of reality. You can't give people the ability to do impossible things, such as flying or growing 10x in size.

Fair warning: this bot can be really inconsistent. It occasionally struggles to understand certain concepts about common sense, and can often give back gibberish or illogical replies. I don't know if it's because I made the bot poorly, or if it's just the LLM.

The intro starts you out in a little train scenario where you can test your powers, but you can just leave the train immediately and go anywhere you want.

If the bot is talking and acting for you, here are some things you can do:

  • Write long, detailed responses that narrate your feelings and actions.

  • Write in third person. So write "{{user}} goes to the gym" instead of "I go to the gym".

  • Set up the scene so that there are NPCs to react to your presence. So don't type: "I walk to the store." Type something like: "I walk to the store. I open the door to the store, seeing what type of people I can see inside." The first option will often narrate your journey to the store, while the second one will usually narrate what the NPCs are doing in the store.

  • Delete the parts of the message where the bot talks for you. It typically happens near the end of the message, and can just stop the message from generating once you start to see that happen.

Content Warning: Possible Rape/NonCon and other similar themes.
